description: Enable the Excalidraw-based collaborative whiteboard feature in the Jitsi Meet Docker deployment by configuring /home/ga/jitsi/.env with WHITEBOARD_ENABLED=true and WHITEBOARD_COLLAB_SERVER_PUBLIC_URL=https://wbd.meet.jitsi. After applying the configuration, join the meeting room "WhiteboardGlossarySession" and write "Glossary Terms" on the whiteboard. Create a file at /tmp/whiteboard_enabled.txt containing the word "done" when finished.
